texto: Ideas and thoughts are like genes...more you keep inside yourself more it multply with same species consuming your whole energy to breed to produce same old ideas and thoughts again and again until it kills you. So, let it be interact with other species..take it out...make reaction with other peoples's thoughts and ideas and produce something new....produce new energy..new thoughts..new perceptions...
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jagdish Poudel: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a autoestima. O trecho “Ideas and thoughts are like genes...more you keep inside yourself more it multply with same speci…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que autoestima, gene, ideas pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de ideas e thoughts.

texto: Everyone has their opinion and everyone loves it. Nobody wants to accepts others opinion. So to make them happy be diplomatic and speak unclearly, let them interpret your thoughts by themselves, let them think what they want to think
